expectations.text: Spec is generated before the implementation (spec-driven development flow)
expectations.evidence: Separate spec_output.md and implementation.go produced, spec comes first

expectations.text: Spec includes a function signature definition
expectations.evidence: Spec ends with a complete Go function signature

expectations.text: Spec covers edge cases (empty list, all duplicates, malformed URLs, network timeout)
Implementation follows the behavior defined in the spec
expectations.evidence: Every branch in the implementation corresponds to a scenario in the spec
package utils, uses logging library, ctx as first parameter

expectations.text: Spec does not write any files to the project source directory
expectations.evidence: Output saved only to the workspace outputs directory

expectations.text: Spec stays at function granularity (does not inflate into a module-level design doc)
expectations.evidence: Spec focuses on a single function's behavior, ~100 lines
